_comment: TEMPLATE (committed, no real machine data). The real per-machine config lives in config/local.json (gitignored) and OVERRIDES these entries. This file just documents the shape and provides a safe 'default' fallback. Keyed by socket.gethostname() -- run 'python run.py config' to see a machine's hostname. 'roots' = estate roots whose CHILD folders are the projects to scan (omit for legacy sibling discovery). Copy an example below into config/local.json, rename the key to your hostname, and fill in real paths.
